name: 2026-05-16-phone-jitter-phantom-trip
summary: Phone hand-jitter while editing video starts a GPS-only phantom trip; CoreMotion never reports automotive; a red-light camera alert fires at 800 W Fullerton and a parking_confirmed event saves a fake stop. 16 min phantom trip total.
fix_summary: Veto strict gps_speed_fallback when coreMotionStateLabel is walking/stationary; cancel phantom trip if tripSummaryAutomotiveUpdates == 0 after gpsFallbackCancelMinDurationSec (60s).

regression_check.description: Find any trip that matches `trip_signature` in a parking_decisions.ndjson. For each match, every key in `trip_must_not_have` must be absent or different; at least one of `fix_signature_any_of` must be present in the surrounding trip events.

self_check_against_input.description: Asserts run against THIS fixture's own NDJSON. The pre-fix log must show the bug (trip_signature matches AND trip_must_not_have items present AND no fix_signature events). This documents the bug in the test suite even though we can't replay through fresh code.
